name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Added to Local Administrators
notes: This Building Block detects user accounts that are added to the local Administrators group, which could be legitimate activity or a sign of privilege escalation activity.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Added to Local Administrators on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Added, Authentication.Group Member Added
when the event matches ("Target Username" ILIKE 'Administr%') OR ("Target Account Security ID" ILIKE '%S-1-5-32-544%') AQL filter query
when the event matches Account Name (custom) is any of $
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Added to Local Administrators on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Added, Authentication.Group Member Added
AND when the event matches ("Target Username" ILIKE 'Administr%') OR ("Target Account Security ID" ILIKE '%S-1-5-32-544%') AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches Account Name (custom) is any of $
